creator: jbeich@FreeBSD.org
text: Also, I don't disagree clang 7 maybe too late for 12.0 train. /head feature freeze is one of the reasons clang 7 stabilization stalled for ~1 month as few users/developers bothered to dogfood external repo and report more bugs. For one, port maintainers maybe reluctant to fix their ports if build on /head is green.
